nasb.text: Also every sickness and every plague which, not written in the book of this law, the Lord will bring on you until you are destroyed.

esv.text: Every sickness also and every affliction that is not recorded in the book of this law, the Lord will bring upon you, until you are destroyed.

cnv.text: 又把這律法書上沒有記載的各樣災病，都降在你身上，直到你被消滅。

ccb.text: 还使一切未记在这律法书上的疾病和灾难降在你们身上，直到消灭你们。
